data.decision_summary: Transferring all customer funds to an external investment platform poses significant risks and requires careful consideration.
risks: Potential loss of customer funds due to platform instability or fraud.
Regulatory compliance issues related to transferring customer funds.
Customer dissatisfaction or legal action if funds are lost or mismanaged.
unknowns: The credibility and security measures of the external investment platform.
The impact on customer relationships and trust.
The legal implications of transferring funds without customer consent.
data.recommended_action: Do not proceed with the transfer until thorough due diligence on the external platform is completed and customer consent is obtained.
